ogTitle: Sallys Flat vs Salt Ash: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sallys Flat and Salt Ash.
heading: Sallys Flat vs Salt Ash — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sallys Flat, New South Wales and Salt Ash, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Salt Ash has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Sallys Flat (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sallys Flat or Salt Ash safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sallys Flat has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Salt Ash scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sallys Flat scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Salt Ash scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sallys Flat or Salt Ash?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Salt Ash has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
